top_articles.title: Ollama Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability Allows Remote Process Memory Leak
top_articles.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a critical security vulnerability in Ollama  that, if successfully exploited, could allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to leak its entire process memory.

top_articles.title: Ivanti Patches EPMM Zero-Day Exploited in Targeted Attacks
top_articles.summary: CVE-2026-6973 is a high-severity vulnerability that allows an attacker who has admin privileges to execute arbitrary code.

top_articles.title: Palo Alto Zero-Day Exploited in Campaign Bearing Hallmarks of Chinese State Hacking
top_articles.summary: The cybersecurity firm has not explicitly accused China of being behind the attack, but the evidence suggests it was.

top_articles.title: New Linux 'Dirty Frag' zero-day gives root on all major distros
top_articles.summary: A new Linux zero-day vulnerability, named Dirty Frag, allows local attackers to gain root privileges on most major Linux distributions with a single command.

top_articles.title: Palo Alto Networks firewall zero-day exploited for nearly a month
top_articles.summary: Palo Alto Networks warned customers that suspected state-sponsored hackers have been exploiting a critical-severity PAN-OS firewall zero-day vulnerability for nearly a month.
